_comment: Populated 2026-04-27 by /codex outside-voice strategy v3. Loaded by autonomous-chain.sh at Stage 3. Each target gets one scan via Etherscan source (no impl override) — fine for non-proxy contracts. Proxy targets would need a separate fetch-impl pass.

programs.name: Inverse Finance (FiRM)
programs.rationale: Per-market contracts, isolated, prior exploit history (Apr/Jun 2022). Solhunt's 75-83% zone (access-control + reentrancy). Max $100k. KYC required.

programs.name: ENS
programs.rationale: NO-KYC, $250k cap. BaseRegistrar is access-control heavy. Heavy audit history but the no-KYC + payout makes one shot worth it.
